title: Winter Wonderland Set of 4 Red Felt Christmas Snowflake Shaped Coasters Tied with a Green Ribbon
features: Bring some extra festivity to your Christmas dining table with this gift set of 4 red felt snowflake coasters.
This delightful set features intricate snowflake edge patterns and a central 'Merry Christmas' cut out titling.
Complete with a green satin ribbon bow to make the perfect gift.
description: Bring some extra festivity to your Christmas dining table with this gift set of 4 red felt snowflake coasters. From the irresistibly regal Royal Affair Collection: bringing merriment and majesty to your festive season. This delightful set features intricate snowflake edge patterns and a central 'Merry Christmas' cut out titling. Complete with a green satin ribbon bow to make the perfect gift. Pair with matching place mats and napkin rings to create a harmonious and joyous tableware set.
